title: Aurelion Pipeline Definition
description: Grammar for pipeline YAML definitions loaded by the native orchestrator. Structural grammar only — per-action arg schemas are merged at the well-known endpoint (Step 11).

name.description: Pipeline identifier. Lowercase, digits, underscores; dot-separated namespaces allowed (e.g. journey.joiner).

schema_version.description: Schema version. Must be 1 for this grammar.

args.description: Pipeline-level argument declarations. Values may use ${args.X} or ${steps.<name>.result.X} template syntax (validated by loader, not by this schema).

triggers.description: Zero or more trigger declarations. 'http' is not a valid trigger type here — manual triggers are universal (POST /pipeline-runs) and never declared in YAML.

steps.description: Ordered list of pipeline steps. At least one step is required.

routing_key.description: RabbitMQ routing key to subscribe on.

match.description: Optional JSONB predicate to filter matching messages.

args_from_payload.description: Map pipeline arg names to dotted payload paths extracted from the MQ message body.

args.description: Args to pass to the pipeline run on schedule trigger.

name.description: Step identifier. Unique within the pipeline.

engine.description: Target engine name (must match a registered engine).

args.description: Step-level args. May use template syntax ${args.X} or ${steps.<name>.result.X}.

retry.description: Retry policy. Schema expanded in Step 5+ (registry).

on_error.description: What to do if the step fails. Defaults to 'fail'.

requires.description: List of step names that must complete before this step runs.

name.description: Step identifier. Unique within the pipeline.

event.description: Event type to wait for (routing key on aurelion.events).

match.description: Optional predicate matched against the event payload.

timeout.description: Maximum wait duration (e.g. '10m', '1h'). REQUIRED — no infinite waits.

on_timeout.description: Action on timeout. Currently only 'fail' is supported.

requires.description: List of step names that must complete before this step runs.
